transitional_classic.description: Warm honey-bronze bar pull — works with shaker, transitional, and traditional doors

contemporary_slab.description: Brushed satin-nickel bar pull — clean horizontal line for flat-front and slab doors

minimalist_edge.description: Slim matte-black bar — nearly flush, pairs with handleless or high-gloss cabinets

industrial_black.description: Flat-black bar pull — bold hardware for open-shelf and loft-style pieces

mission_craftsman.description: Unfinished solid-wood cup pull — period-correct for Mission, Arts & Crafts, and farmhouse
